recalls.Description:
Lola + The Boys has issued a recall for five styles of youth hooded clothing featuring drawstrings, which pose a serious strangulation hazard. The recalled items include the Candy Heart Tie Dye set, Hoodie Unicorn Tutu set, Justice League Hero hoodie, Emoji Love hoodie, and Crystal Rainbow Rain hoodie. These garments were available in youth sizes 1 through 12, with the brand name and size indicated on the neck label.

The drawstrings can become entangled, leading to the risk of severe injury or death in children. This recall is in compliance with federal regulations concerning children's upper outerwear, highlighting the significant danger these products present.
recalls.Title: Lola + The Boys Recalls Youth Hooded Clothing Due to Strangulation Risk
recalls.ConsumerContact: For further assistance, consumers can contact Lola + The Boys at 312-285-6053 from 10 a.m. to 5 p.m. CT, Monday through Friday, or email customerservice@lolaandtheboys.com. More details can be found online at https://lolaandtheboys.com/pages/recall or by visiting https://lolaandtheboys.com/ and clicking on 'Recall Policy' at the bottom of the homepage.

Images.Caption: Recalled Lola + The Boys Candy Heart Tie Dye Set
Recalled Lola + The Boys Hoodie Unicorn Tutu Set
Recalled Lola + The Boys Justice League Hero Gray Hoodie
Recalled Lola + The Boys Emoji Love Hoodie
Recalled Lola + The Boys Crystal Rainbow Rain Hoodie

Retailers.Name: Available at Lola + The Boys stores nationwide and online at Lolaandtheboys.com between November 2022 and September 2025, priced between $45 and $80.

Importers.Name: Lola Plus The Boys Inc., of Chicago, Illinois

Hazards.Name: Strangulation hazard due to drawstrings in clothing

Remedies.Name: Remove drawstrings, keep clothing away from children, and request a full refund

recalls.metaDescription: Lola + The Boys recalls youth hooded clothing due to a strangulation risk. Learn how to get a refund and keep your children safe.

recalls.Description:
Umeyda is recalling its children's short-sleeve nightgowns made from 100% cotton due to a serious fire hazard. These nightgowns, available in various colors including black, purple, mint green, and more, come in sizes ranging from 4-5T to 13-14 years. Each gown features a pocket and buttons down the front, with specific details printed on a sewn-in label. The garments do not meet mandatory flammability standards for children's sleepwear, which poses a significant burn risk to children.

Consumers are urged to stop using these nightgowns immediately. To obtain a full refund, they should contact Umeyda Company. Additionally, consumers must cut the nightgowns in half and send a photo of the destroyed items to ameyda123@163.com to process their refund. Proper disposal of the damaged garments is also required.
recalls.Title: Umeyda Children's Nightgowns Recalled for Fire Hazard Risk
recalls.ConsumerContact: Contact Umeyda Company via email at ameyda123@163.com.

Images.Caption: Recalled Umeyda Shortsleeve Nightgown – Baby Pink Stripe
Recalled Umeyda Shortsleeve Nightgown – Baby Pink

Label on side seam of nightgown

Retailers.Name: Available on Amazon from June 2025 through October 2025 for approximately $19.

Distributors.Name: Xindu District Miuwola Clothing Store dba Umeyda Company, of China

Hazards.Name: Violation of mandatory flammability standards for children's sleepwear, increasing the risk of burn injuries.

Remedies.Name: Stop using the nightgowns, cut them in half, email a photo of the destroyed garments to receive a full refund, and dispose of the items.

recalls.metaDescription: Umeyda recalls children's nightgowns due to fire hazard. Immediate action required for refunds and safety.

recalls.Description: Bmrwtg is recalling its LED Tutu Skirts due to a serious risk of injury or death from battery ingestion. These skirts, available in various colors including pink, purple, yellow, red, blue, green, white, and black, feature decorative silver circles and stars that light up. Designed for children aged 2 to 8, the skirts contain a battery compartment with two accessible CR2032 lithium coin batteries, posing a significant safety risk.
recalls.Title: Bmrwtg LED Tutu Skirts Recalled Due to Battery Ingestion Hazard for Children
recalls.ConsumerContact: For assistance, reach out to Bmrwtg via email at bmrwtgrecall@outlook.com.

Images.Caption: Recalled Bmrwtg Children's Tutu Skirt in Pink
The recalled Bmrwtg children's tutu skirts have a battery compartment with lithium coin batteries

Retailers.Name: Available on Amazon from March 2025 to August 2025 for approximately $10.

Hazards.Name: Risk of serious injury or death from ingestion of lithium coin batteries

Remedies.Name: Stop using the skirt, remove and dispose of the batteries, and contact Bmrwtg for a full refund. Cut the skirt and send a photo of the destroyed item to bmrwtgrecall@outlook.com. Follow local hazardous waste guidelines for battery disposal.

recalls.metaDescription: Bmrwtg recalls LED Tutu Skirts due to battery ingestion risks. Immediate action required for safety.

recalls.Description: Oso & Me is recalling its 100% cotton children's long sleeve pajama sets due to a serious burn hazard. The pajama sets, featuring the 'Animal Party' design with a light blue background and dark blue velvet piping, depict various animals including lions, zebras, and flamingos. These sets were available in sizes ranging from 3Y to 8Y and included a reusable cotton gift bag with matching fabric. Each set is labeled with 'Oso & Me' and the size on the neck and waistband, along with care instructions and manufacturing details on the side seam.
recalls.Title: Oso & Me Recalls Children's Pajama Sets Due to Burn Risk and Flammability Violations
recalls.ConsumerContact: Consumers should immediately stop using the pajama sets and contact Oso & Me at 415-742-5168 from 9 a.m. to 5 p.m. PT, Monday through Friday, or email ProductRecall@osoandme.com. For additional information, visit https://www.osoandme.com/pages/product-recall or go to www.osoandme.com and select 'Product Recalls' under 'Support' at the bottom of the page.

Images.Caption: Recalled Oso & Me "Animal Party" Pajama Set
Images.SourceImageURL: https://www.cpsc.gov/s3fs-public/Recalled Oso & Me “Animal Party” Pajama Set.png

Retailers.Name: Available at various stores nationwide and online through Oso & Me, The Little, Mud Pie, Marigold Modern, Nellie George, Pitt Street Kids, Swaddle AL, and Bea Colette from January 2020 to November 2023 for approximately $98. Some products were also gifted to brand influencers and friends.

Importers.Name: Oso Children LLC, of San Francisco, California

Hazards.Name: Burn hazard due to flammability regulation violations

Remedies.Name: Stop using the pajamas and contact Oso & Me for a full refund. Consumers must destroy the garment by cutting it in half and send a photo of the destroyed item to receive a refund.

recalls.metaDescription: Oso & Me recalls children's pajama sets due to burn risks. Learn how to get a refund and safety instructions.

recalls.Description: The Vanilla Underground Minecraft TNT pajamas are a hooded one-piece sleepwear item featuring a soft fabric adorned with green Creepers and TNT designs from the popular Minecraft game. These pajamas have bright green cuffs at the wrists and ankles, a green zipper running from the neck to the waist, and a hood. The neck label displays 'Minecraft,' while the side-seam label includes the Vanilla Underground logo and relevant care instructions, emphasizing the need to keep the garment away from fire.
recalls.Title: Recall of Vanilla Underground Minecraft TNT Pajamas Due to Burn Hazard and Flammability Regulation Violation
recalls.ConsumerContact: For assistance, contact Vanilla Underground at 800-918-5294, available Monday through Friday from 3 a.m. to 12:30 p.m. ET. You can also reach them via email at customercare@vanillaunderground.com or visit their website at https://www.vanillaunderground.com/ and click on 'Product Recall' in the footer, or go to https://www.vanillaunderground.com/pages/product-recall.

Products.Name: Vanilla Underground Minecraft TNT Hooded Pajamas

Images.Caption: Recalled Vanilla Underground "Minecraft TNT" One-Piece Pajama
Images.SourceImageURL: https://www.cpsc.gov/s3fs-public/Recalled Vanilla Underground “Minecraft TNT” One-Piece Pajama.png

Images.Caption: Recalled Vanilla Underground "Minecraft TNT" One-Piece Pajama
Images.SourceImageURL: https://www.cpsc.gov/s3fs-public/Recalled Vanilla Underground “Minecraft TNT” One-Piece Pajama 2.png

Images.Caption: Front of Neck Label
Back of Neck Label
Side Seam Label Front and Back
Images.SourceImageURL: https://www.cpsc.gov/s3fs-public/Side Seam Label Front and Back.jpg

Retailers.Name: Available online at amazon.com and vanillaunderground.com from October 2022 through January 2024, priced between $42 and $44.

Importers.Name: Premier P. LTD, of United Kingdom

Hazards.Name: Failure to meet federal flammability regulations for children's sleepwear, leading to potential burn risks.

Remedies.Name: Immediately stop using the pajamas, keep them away from children, and contact Vanilla Underground for a full refund. Consumers should destroy the pajamas by cutting them in half and disposing of them according to local recycling laws. A photo of the destroyed pajamas should be sent to customercare@vanillaunderground.com to receive a full refund.

recalls.metaDescription: Recall of Vanilla Underground Minecraft TNT pajamas due to burn hazards. Consumers urged to stop use and seek refunds.
